hero.title: Let universities find you
hero.valueLine: Get matched with universities and scholarships in one platform. Save time and money.
hero.subtitle: Connecting Students and Universities Without Intermediaries
hero.description: Edmission is a national digital platform that enables transparent admissions between students and universities through AI-powered matching and direct communication.

trusted.title: Trusted by universities and students across the World

howItWorksSection.title: One clear flow for every participant
howItWorksSection.description: Students, universities, and school counsellors each move through a structured path from onboarding to offers.

accreditation.title: Accreditation & Standards
accreditation.description: Edmission operates to recognized quality and trust standards in education.
accreditation.qualityDesc: We follow best practices for transparent admissions and student-universi ty matching.
accreditation.trustDesc: Your data is secure and our processes are designed for fairness and reliability.
accreditation.standardsDesc: Our platform aligns with institutional and worldwide admission standards.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: Official certifications and partnership documents with universities and organizations.

item1.quote: I got matched with three universities and a scholarship offer in two weeks. No agency fees.
item1.author: Student, Tashkent

item2.quote: Edmission gave us qualified leads and a clear pipeline. We reduced recruitment costs significantly.

item3.quote: Finally a platform where I could compare programs and talk to universities directly. Very transparent.

ctaBlock.title: Ready to get started?
ctaBlock.description: Create your profile and get matched with universities and scholarship opportunities.

items.a: Edmission is a direct admission platform that connects students and universities without agencies. You create a profile, get AI-powered university matches, and can receive scholarship offers directly from universities.
Yes. Students can create an account, build a profile, explore universities, and receive recommendations and offers at no cost. There are no hidden fees.
Our system uses your grades, field of study, language, budget, and preferences to recommend universities and programs that fit. Each match includes a transparent score breakdown.

items.q: Which countries and universities are on Edmission?
items.a: We cooperate with over 50 Universities around the globe. You can explore available programs and countries once you sign up.

items.q: How do I get scholarship offers?
items.a: Universities on the platform allocate scholarships and send offers to matched students. Completing your profile and applying to programs increases your visibility to universities.

problem.title: The Admission System Is Broken
problem.description: Students and universities are both affected by opaque processes and inefficient intermediaries.

cards.title: Direct Connection
cards.desc: Students and universities communicate directly in a secure environment.

cards.title: Transparent Matching
cards.desc: Each recommendation includes explicit factor-level score breakdown.

cards.title: Scholarship Allocation
cards.desc: Universities allocate, track, and govern scholarship slots in one workflow.

cards.title: Structured Admission Pipeline
cards.desc: Progress flows through a clear pipeline from discovery to accepted offer.

matching.title: Transparent Matching Technology
matching.description: Match score is calculated using deterministic factors and shown as a transparent breakdown for both sides.

walkthrough.title: Core workflows in one integrated experience
walkthrough.description: Horizontally explore key product surfaces designed for modern admission operations.

cards.title: University discovery
cards.desc: Filter-ready university feed with transparent match insights.

cards.title: Application tracking
cards.desc: Live statuses from interested to accepted.

cards.title: Offer management
cards.desc: Scholarship offer flow with deadline and response controls.

student.title: Built for Students
student.description: Every step is built for clarity, speed, and direct access to universities.

university.title: Built for Universities
university.description: Operational tooling for structured student acquisition, communication, and scholarship governance.

scholarship.title: Scholarship Infrastructure
scholarship.description: Universities allocate scholarship coverage through a structured and trackable pipeline.

ai.title: AI Admission Guidance
ai.description: An embedded assistant helps students and universities make informed admission decisions with contextual insights.
ai.chatQ1: Suggest universities with scholarship potential above 60%.
ai.chatA1: Based on GPA, language, and budget, 6 strong options are available. Would you like a comparison table?

network.title: A Growing Academic Network
network.description: A distributed network of students and universities connected through a single transparent infrastructure layer.
network.node6: Offers and decisions in one flow

finalCta.title: Join the Future of Academic Admissions
finalCta.description: Build transparent admission workflows for students and universities on a single intelligent platform.

footer.description: Academic infrastructure platform connecting students and universities without intermediaries.
footer.noHiddenFees: No hidden fees. We don't sell your data.

security.title: Security & Compliance
security.compliance: We operate in line with European data protection standards (GDPR) and best practices.
security.dataProtection: Your data is processed securely. We do not sell personal data to third parties.
security.memberData: Member data is used only to provide the service: matching, applications, and communications. You can request access, correction, or deletion at any time.

cookie.title: Cookie notice
cookie.description: We use cookies to provide the service, remember your preferences, and improve the site. By continuing, you agree to our use of cookies.
